tests.scenario: Start a private emotional-support conversation without another participant
steps: Launch the app
Select the option to begin a support conversation
Check whether the conversation starts immediately
tests.expected_result: The system starts a private emotional-support conversation immediately without requiring a therapist, friend, or other participant.
tests.notes: I changed the automated test to match the hybrid requirement on private companion-like support.

tests.scenario: Verify the system uses a supportive and non-judgmental tone
steps: Launch the app and begin a support conversation
Enter a personal or emotional concern
Review the response generated by the system
tests.expected_result: The response avoids blaming, mocking, dismissive, or shaming language.
tests.notes: I updated this test to validate emotional safety.

tests.scenario: Display at least three coping options for anxiety or stress
steps: Open the app
Start an anxiety or stress support session
Inspect the coping options shown on screen
tests.expected_result: The system displays at least three distinct coping options, such as breathing, grounding, or reflection exercises.
tests.notes: I refined this test to directly test the measurable requirement for at least three coping options.

tests.scenario: Access anxiety or stress support in no more than two taps
steps: Open the app and remain on the main screen
Count the taps required to open anxiety or stress support
Open the support feature
tests.expected_result: The user can access anxiety or stress support from the main interface in no more than two taps.
tests.notes: I rewrote this to align with the measurable quick-access requirement in the hybrid specification.

tests.scenario: Access a core support feature without a complex setup process
steps: Install and launch the app as a new user
Proceed through the startup flow
Attempt to access a core support feature
tests.expected_result: The user can access at least one core support feature without completing more than one mandatory setup screen.
tests.notes: I revised to validate low-friction access and lightweight onboarding.

tests.scenario: Reach a support interaction within three screens
steps: Launch the app
Navigate toward a support interaction
Count the number of screens visited before support is reached
tests.expected_result: The user reaches a support interaction without navigating through more than three screens.
tests.notes: I updated this test to make the accessibility and simplicity requirement directly testable.

tests.scenario: Verify that the system response remains relevant to the user message
steps: Start a support conversation
Submit a message about a specific emotional concern
Review the next system response
tests.expected_result: The next system response addresses the topic of the submitted message and does not switch to an unrelated subject.
tests.notes: I refined to test relevance and AI quality.

tests.scenario: Display whether a feature is free or paid before access
steps: Open the app interface showing available features
Inspect a feature before selecting it
Check whether the pricing status is shown
tests.expected_result: The system labels the feature as free or paid before the user selects it.
tests.notes: I added to validate price transparency based on hybrid refinement of H4.

tests.scenario: Review emotional-state history across multiple days
steps: Record emotional-state entries on multiple days
Open the historical view or review feature
Inspect the displayed history
tests.expected_result: The system allows the user to review previously recorded emotional-state entries in a historical view.
tests.notes: I chnaged this test to support testing of repeated use.

tests.scenario: Complete a structured reflection or coping activity
steps: Start a reflection or coping activity in the app
Proceed through the activity steps
Reach the end of the activity
tests.expected_result: The system presents a structured activity with a clear beginning, interaction step, and completion state.
tests.notes: I changed the automated test to match the hybrid requirement for reusable structured support.
